# ADR Template

```markdown
---
id: ADR-NNN
title: "{Title}"
status: proposed | accepted | deprecated | superseded
date: YYYY-MM-DD
superseded_by: ADR-NNN  # optional
---

## Context

What problem prompted this decision?

## Decision

What was decided?

## Consequences

### Positive

- Pro 1
- Pro 2

### Negative

- Con 1
- Con 2

## Alternatives Considered

- Alternative 1 (rejected because...)
- Alternative 2 (rejected because...)
```
